creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Lost the comment, sorry ...

Attached you'll find another SHAR targetting POCL 0.11. There is still an issue in test case 22, which is triggered due to the fact that FreeBSD names the Intel 64 bit architecture amd64 and in Linux, it is named x86_64. I'm on this but due to duties it will take a while.
